CustomField.description: When checked and State_Reducer_Class__c is blank, the framework uses the built-in CursorBatchCounterReducer for shared state. When a custom State_Reducer_Class__c is specified, the custom class is always used regardless of this checkbox.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this to enable the built-in counter reducer for shared state (additive numeric counters). Leave unchecked if the job does not need shared state.
CustomField.label: Enable Built-in State Reducer
